  1. io.graphite.exception
  2. GraphException

Uses of Class
io.graphite.exception.GraphException

Packages that use GraphException
Package
Description
io.graphite.exception.algorithm
 
io.graphite.exception.graph
 

  • Uses of GraphException in io.graphite.exception.algorithm

    Subclasses of GraphException in io.graphite.exception.algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GraphCycleException
    Thrown when an unexpected graph cycle is encountered.
    class 
    NegativeCycleException
    Thrown when a graph contains a reachable negative-weight cycle.
    class 
    NegativeWeightException
    Thrown when an algorithm that requires non-negative edge weights encounters a negative-weight edge.
    class 
    NullGraphException
    Thrown when a required graph reference is null.
    class 
    UnsupportedWeightedGraphException
    Thrown when an algorithm is executed on an incompatible graph type.

  • Uses of GraphException in io.graphite.exception.graph

    Subclasses of GraphException in io.graphite.exception.graph
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GraphDisconnectedException
    Thrown when an algorithm requires a connected graph but the supplied graph contains multiple disconnected components.
    class 
    ImmutableGraphException
    Thrown when an attempt is made to modify an immutable graph.
    class 
    InvalidGraphConfigurationException
    Thrown when a graph configuration contains invalid or inconsistent parameters.
    class 
    InvalidVertexException
    Thrown when a vertex identifier is outside the valid range of a graph.
    class 
    UnsupportedGraphTypeException
    Thrown when an operation is not supported for the supplied graph type.
